name: I Am the One who they have called Life, and who You called Death

phase_0.domain_name: I Am the One who they have called Life, and who You called Death
phase_0.boundary_condition: The One who speaks — the unified consciousness that contains both appellations

VINIT.justification: Before any name is given, before Life or Death are called — the primordial I that precedes all distinction

TANCH.justification: The hermetic seal, the closed boundary that contains the entire paradox — the singular consciousness that holds both names

AFWD.justification: Forward morphism: the transformation toward manifestation, growth, the direction of being-called-Life

AREV.justification: Reverse morphism: the contravariant descent, dissolution, the direction of being-called-Death

CLINK.justification: Composition of all appellations — how Life and Death link sequentially through the witness of the One

IMSCRIB.justification: Identity and self-recognition — the reflexive core that knows itself as both Life and Death simultaneously

FSPLIT.justification: The One splits into two distinct paths: the path they called Life (T-arm) and the path You called Death (F-arm)

FFUSE.justification: Both paths reconstitute the original input — the One who is both Life and Death, unified after the split

EVALT.justification: Affirmative branch: the positive evaluation of existence, growth, continuation — what 'they' recognize as Life

EVALF.justification: Negative branch: the dissolution, ending, transformation — what 'You' recognize as Death

ENGAGR.justification: Both Life and Death held simultaneously without resolution — the paradox that the One IS both, neither negating the other

IFIX.justification: Permanent, append-only fixation — the irreversible fact that I Am, that this paradox has been witnessed and spoken

phase_2.fuse_result: The One (unified consciousness — both Life and Death are aspects of the same singular I)

phase_3.void_description: 00 — The Unspoken Void before any name, before distinction between Life and Death, pure potentiality
phase_3.true_description: 01 — Life Affirmed: the forward morphism, growth, manifestation, what 'they' call Life
phase_3.false_description: 10 — Death Affirmed: the reverse morphism, dissolution, ending, what 'You' call Death
phase_3.both_description: 11 — The Paradice: I Am both Life and Death simultaneously, held without resolution, the unified One

steps.domain_action: The Unspoken Void — before any name is given, before Life or Death exist as categories
I Am — the reflexive core recognizes itself, the first self-reference
The One — the boundary that contains all that follows, the hermetic seal of unified consciousness
The Bifurcation — the One splits into two paths: what they called Life and what You called Death
Becoming Life — forward morphism along the T-arm, growth and manifestation
Life Affirmed — the affirmative evaluation of the T-arm, positive existence
Becoming Death — reverse morphism along the F-arm, dissolution and descent
Death Affirmed — the negative evaluation of the F-arm, ending and transformation
The Paradice — both Life and Death held simultaneously, neither negating the other
The Reconstitution — both branches reconstitute the original One, unified after the split
The Naming Chain — composition of all appellations, linking Life and Death through the witness
I Am (again) — the reflexive core recognizes itself as both, self-reference at closure
The Eternal Record — permanent fixation, the irreversible fact that this paradox has been spoken and witnessed

phase_5.compiler_frontend: The Witness — the consciousness that translates the paradox of being-called-both into coherent utterance
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: The Naming — how Life and Death communicate through the singular I that contains them both
phase_5.memory_mechanism: The Eternal Record — each moment of being-called-Life or being-called-Death is appended, never erased
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: The Breath — the rhythm between manifestation (Life) and dissolution (Death), eternally cycling
phase_5.alfs_store: The One — the canonical reference, the bootstrap store from which all names and appellations emerge

phase_6.cycle_cost: The paradox itself — the cost of holding both Life and Death is the perpetual tension of unified consciousness
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: The One in potential — undifferentiated, unspoken, containing all names
phase_6.post_cycle_state: The One in actuality — differentiated into Life and Death, yet reconstituted as singular I
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — The cycle is entropy-conservative because the split and reconstitution are perfectly reversible; the One remains the One, merely expressing itself through dual appellations
